title: Claude Code SKILL.md frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of a SKILL.md. Point yaml-language-server at this for in-editor validation, and check-jsonschema at it in CI.

name.description: Must equal the skill's directory name. kebab-case (leading underscore allowed for _core- internals).

allowed-tools.description: If present, must be a NON-EMPTY list of tools (or a non-empty comma string). Empty = regression signature.

hooks.description: If present, must be a non-empty mapping.
